confidence_rationale: This video is a compilation/documentary of a Basic Laparoscopic Workshop at Monash University. It contains establishing shots, institutional branding, classroom instruction, group demonstrations, and multiple participants at different stations. While FLS trainer boxes and instruments are visible, there is no single, complete, timed performance of a specific FLS task by one trainee from start to finish. The video is primarily educational/promotional showing the workshop setting, instructor delivery, and general training activities rather than a scoreable individual task performance.
cannot_determine: Specific FLS task being performed (multiple tasks may be shown)

demonstrated_techniques: FLS trainer box setup and instrument orientation
Knot tying techniques (visible on monitor display)
Workshop organization and group instruction methodology
verbal_cues: Welcoming speech by instructor at workshop opening
common_errors_addressed: Not explicitly shown - content focuses on setup and introduction rather than error correction
teaching_content.skill_level_demonstrated: mixed - instructional content showing novice trainees in supervised learning environment

improvement_suggestions: To obtain a scoreable FLS performance, provide a video showing a single individual performing one complete task from start to finish with clear timing markers
